title: Abraham Lincoln, Born Feb. 12, 1809
content:
To-day, from each and all, a breath of prayer, a pulse of thought,
To memory of Him, to birth of Him.
meaning:
Walt Whitman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Abraham Lincoln, Born Feb. 12, 1809"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
